decisions.decision: Two-phase incremental reindex: after removing changed-file nodes, re-run edge-building phases (calls, imports, heritage, types, exports) for ALL indexed files whose parse results reference changed symbols, not just new_or_changed files.
decisions.rationale: P0 fix. Current approach only rebuilds edges from changed files, losing incoming edges from unchanged callers. A targeted reverse-dependency scan (find files that import/call symbols in changed files) is cheaper than full rebuild while restoring correctness.

decisions.decision: Reset _hybrid_search to None at the start of index() so next search() call triggers a fresh build_index().
decisions.rationale: P1 fix. Minimal change — one line in index(). Lazy rebuild on next search is safe because build_index() reads current storage state.

decisions.decision: In heritage.py, resolve child_id by trying all class-like labels (CLASS, INTERFACE, TYPE_ALIAS, ENUM) instead of hardcoding NodeLabel.CLASS.
decisions.rationale: P1 fix. An interface implementing another interface, or a type alias extending a class, generates the wrong ID and silently drops the edge. Use the class_index to look up child_name the same way parent_name is looked up.

decisions.decision: Add 'label': ir.node.label.value to the dict emitted in review_impact() entries.
decisions.rationale: P1 fix. CLI formatter at workflow_memory.py:1017 reads e['label']. One-line addition prevents KeyError crash.

decisions.decision: Add graph.index() call in cmd_graph_flows() before graph.flows(), matching the pattern used by cmd_graph_dead() and cmd_graph_coupling().
decisions.rationale: P2 fix. Consistent with other commands. Without auto-index, fresh repos always report zero flows.

decisions.decision: Expand context() to return all 6 keys the CLI expects: node, callers, callees, importers, imports, parent_classes, child_classes. Callers should return GraphNode list (unwrap confidence tuples for the dict, keep callers_with_confidence() as separate method).
decisions.rationale: P2 fix. CLI formatter at workflow_memory.py:1047-1068 iterates all 6 neighborhood keys. The context() method is the public API for graph-context command. Add storage queries for import/heritage neighbors.

decisions.decision: Defer proximity feature. Remove dangling test expectations if any. The prioritize_context() workflow entrypoint is sufficient for now.
decisions.rationale: P2 finding. No consumers of the missing proximity.py or ContextGraph.prioritize_files(). The existing prioritize_context() function works. Adding proximity is a new feature, not a bug fix.

constraints: Python stdlib-only for core graph modules (kuzu is the single external dep for storage)
Lazy imports for kuzu to avoid cascading ImportError when graph is not installed
Parameterized Cypher queries only (no f-string interpolation of user data)
Heritage edge fix must handle all NodeLabel class-like types: CLASS, INTERFACE, TYPE_ALIAS, ENUM
context() return type must remain dict[str, Any] for CLI compatibility

verified.title: Incremental reindex drops cross-file edges
verified.description: remove_nodes_by_file() deletes all edges for changed files, but edge-building phases only run on new_or_changed files. Unchanged callers to changed symbols lose their CALLS edges permanently.

verified.title: HybridSearch cache not invalidated after reindex
verified.description: _hybrid_search is initialized lazily but never reset when index() rebuilds the graph. Subsequent search() calls return stale/empty results.

verified.title: Heritage edges drop non-CLASS children
verified.description: generate_id(NodeLabel.CLASS, ...) is used for child lookup but interfaces, enums, and type aliases have different label prefixes in their IDs. get_node() returns None and the edge is silently skipped.

verified.title: review_impact() entries missing 'label' key
verified.description: review_impact() emits dicts with name/file_path/depth but not label. CLI formatter at workflow_memory.py:1017 reads e['label'], causing KeyError at runtime.

verified.title: graph-flows CLI doesn't auto-index
verified.description: cmd_graph_flows() calls graph.flows() directly without graph.index(). Other commands (dead, coupling, blast-radius) auto-index. Fresh repos report zero flows.

verified.title: context() returns 3 keys, CLI expects 7
verified.description: context() returns {node, callers, callees}. CLI formatter expects {node, callers, callees, importers, imports, parent_classes, child_classes}. Additionally callers returns (node, confidence) tuples but formatter expects plain nodes.

deferred.title: Proximity feature incomplete
deferred.description: proximity.py doesn't exist, ContextGraph.prioritize_files() is absent. Existing prioritize_context() works. This is a new feature, not a bug fix.

resolved.title: Post-commit hook silently skips when venv missing
resolved.description: Returns exit code 0 on skip, which is correct behavior — hooks should not block commits when optional graph tooling is unavailable.
